title: AI agents explained: Build your first agent in 8 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech releases a tutorial on building AI agents using the Agent Development Kit, demonstrating practical multi-agent systems with the ReAct framework. The video walks through creating a self-correcting blog writing agent with planner and writer components that validate and retry until success.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building autonomous, self-correcting multi-agent systems with the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) in Python. The tutorial explains the ReAct Framework and three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning. It then builds a practical Blog Writing Agent that adds validation and auto-correction through checker and loop agents. The result is a concrete example of how agentic workflows handle their own error correction rather than relying on a single pass.
